name: open-codex-ui
description: Electron desktop UI for the local Codex app-server.

scripts.dev: npm run build:packages && npm run dev -w open-codex-ui-electron-app
scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build -w open-codex-ui-electron-app
scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w @open-codex-ui/codex-rpc && npm run build -w @open-codex-ui/opencodex-protocol && npm run build -w @open-codex-ui/opencodex-core && npm run build -w @open-codex-ui/opencodex-ui
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:packages && npm run typecheck -w open-codex-ui-electron-app
